title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!
